w3_w1_weight.\n        tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale = torch.empty(module.expert_size_per_partition,\n                                             dtype=torch.float32)\n        tmp_w2_weight_scale = torch.empty(module.expert_size_per_partition,\n                                          dtype=torch.float32)\n\n        for local_slot_id, expert_id in enumerate(\n                module.initial_local_expert_ids):\n            if module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n                w1_weight_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale\"]\n                w3_weight_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale\"]\n                w2_weight_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale\"]\n            elif module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.FUSED_GATE_UP_PROJ:\n                w1_weight_scale = weights[f\"gate_up_proj_weight_scale\"]\n                w3_weight_scale = weights[f\"gate_up_proj_weight_scale\"]\n                w2_weight_scale = weights[f\"down_proj_weight_scale\"]\n            else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unknown weight loading mode in MoE: {module.weight_loading_mode}\"\n                )\n\n            expert_idx = local_slot_id\n\n            self.load_expert_w3_w1_weight_scale_fp8_qdq(\n                w1_weight_scale, w3_weight_scale,\n                tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale[expert_idx])\n\n            # Shared code from FP8QDQFusedMoEMethod, need to pass a transposed view\n            requantize_expert_w3_w1_weight_fp8_qdq(\n                module, w1_weight_scale, w3_weight_scale,\n                module.w3_w1_weight.data[expert_idx].transpose(0, 1))\n\n            self.load_expert_w2_weight_scale_fp8(\n                w2_weight_scale, tmp_w2_weight_scale[expert_idx])\n\n        # now we can shuffle the weights for the activation kernel\n        module.w3_w1_weight.data = shuffle_weight_for_activation_kernel(\n            module.w3_w1_weight.data)\n        if module.bias:\n            # Bias should also be shuffled here\n            module.w3_w1_bias.data = shuffle_weight_for_activation_kernel(\n                module.w3_w1_bias.data)\n        # Step3: calculate and store final loaded weights\n        module.fc31_dequant.data.copy_(tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                                       non_blocking=True)\n        module.fc2_dequant.data.copy_(tmp_w2_weight_scale, non_blocking=True)\n        module.fc31_input_dequant.data.copy_(max_fc31_input_scale,\n                                             non_blocking=True)\n        module.fc2_input_dequant.data.copy_(max_fc2_input_scale,\n                                            non_blocking=True)\n\n    def load_expert_weights_to_dst(\n            self, module: torch.nn.Module, weights: List[Dict],\n            weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode,\n            load_expert_ids: List[int], dst_w3_w1_weights_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n            dst_w2_weights_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n            dst_w3_w1_bias_tensor: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n            dst_w2_bias_tensor: Optional[torch.Tensor]):\n        FusedMoEMethodBase.load_expert_weights_to_dst(\n            self, module, weights, weight_loading_mode, load_expert_ids,\n            dst_w3_w1_weights_tensor, dst_w2_weights_tensor,\n            dst_w3_w1_bias_tensor, dst_w2_bias_tensor)\n        module.w3_w1_weight.data = maybe_update_stride(module.w3_w1_weight.data)\n        module.w2_weight.data = maybe_update_stride(module.w2_weight.data)\n\n    def apply(self, module: torch.nn.Module, x: torch.Tensor,\n              router_logits: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n        # Fetch all the data needed for the Triton kernel\n        hidden_states, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n            x, module.fc31_input_dequant)\n        hidden_states_scale = module.fc31_input_dequant\n        expert_logits = router_logits\n        gemm1_weights = module.w3_w1_weight\n        gemm1_scales = module.fc31_dequant\n        gemm2_weights = module.w2_weight\n        gemm2_scales = module.fc2_dequant\n        top_k = module.routing_method.experts_per_token\n\n        # hidden_states: (num_tokens, hidden_dim) torch.float8_e4m3fn\n        # hidden_states_scale: (,) torch.float32\n        # expert_logits: (num_tokens, num_experts) torch.bfloat16\n        # gemm1_weights: (num_experts, hidden_dim, intermediate_dim * 2) torch.float8_e4m3fn\n        # gemm1_scales: (num_experts, ) torch.float32\n        # gemm2_weights: (num_experts, intermediate_dim, hidden_dim) torch.float8_e4m3fn\n        # gemm2_scales: (num_experts, ) torch.float32\n\n        # Step 1: Routing\n        num_experts = expert_logits.shape[1]\n        if num_experts > 1:\n            rdata, gather_indx, scatter_indx = TritonEPRouter()(\n                expert_logits,\n                top_k,\n                ep=module.ep_size,\n                node_idx=module.ep_rank)\n        else:\n            rdata, gather_indx, scatter_indx = None, None, None\n\n        # Step 2: Gemm1\n        # Setup quantization context\n        flex_ctx_1 = FlexCtx(\n            lhs_data=InFlexData(scale=hidden_states_scale),\n            rhs_data=InFlexData(scale=gemm1_scales),\n        )\n        pc1 = PrecisionConfig(flex_ctx=flex_ctx_1,\n                              allow_tf32=False,\n                              out_dtype=module.dtype)\n\n        # Call the Triton gemm kernel, which also does permutation and activation\n        alpha = module.swiglu_alpha or 1.0\n        beta = module.swiglu_beta or 0.0\n        if beta == 1.0:\n            act = FusedActivation(\n                FnSpecs(\"swiglu\", triton_kernels.swiglu.swiglu_fn,\n                        (\"alpha\", \"limit\")), (alpha, module.swiglu_limit), 2)\n            act_out = matmul_ogs(hidden_states,\n                                 gemm1_weights,\n                                 module.w3_w1_bias if module.bias else None,\n                                 rdata,\n                                 gather_indx=gather_indx,\n                                 precision_config=pc1,\n                                 fused_activation=act)\n        else:\n            act_out = matmul_ogs(hidden_states,\n                                 gemm1_weights,\n                                 module.w3_w1_bias if module.bias else None,\n                                 rdata,\n                                 gather_indx=gather_indx,\n                                 precision_config=pc1)\n            act_out = swiglu_torch(act_out, alpha, beta, module.swiglu_limit)\n\n        # Quantize the activation output manually since the Triton activation kernel doesn't support bf16 in fp8 out\n        act_out, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n            act_out, module.fc2_input_dequant)\n\n        # Step 3: Gemm2\n        # Setup quantization context\n        flex_ctx_2 = FlexCtx(\n            lhs_data=InFlexData(scale=module.fc2_input_dequant),\n            rhs_data=InFlexData(scale=gemm2_scales),\n        )\n        pc2 = PrecisionConfig(flex_ctx=flex_ctx_2,\n                              allow_tf32=False,\n                              out_dtype=module.dtype)\n\n        # Call the Triton kernel, which also does finalization\n        gemm2_output = matmul_ogs(act_out,\n                                  gemm2_weights,\n                                  module.w2_bias if module.bias else None,\n                                  rdata,\n                                  scatter_indx=scatter_indx,\n                                  precision_config=pc2,\n                                  gammas=rdata.gate_scal if rdata else None)\n        return gemm2_output\n\n\nclass TritonMXFP4FusedMoEQuantScales(NamedTuple):\n    fc1_dequant: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_dequant: torch.Tensor\n    fc1_input_dequant: torch.Tensor\n    fc2_input_dequant: torch.Tensor\n\n\ndef swizzle_weight_and_scale(w: torch.Tensor, w_scale: torch.Tensor):\n    # (num_experts, in_dim//2, out_dim)\n    w_shape = w.shape\n    # (num_experts, in_dim//32, out_dim)\n    w_scale_shape = w_scale.shape\n    assert w_shape[0] == w_scale_shape[0]\n    assert w_shape[1] * 2 == w_scale_shape[1] * 32\n    assert w_shape[2] == w_scale_shape[2]\n    w = maybe_update_stride(w)\n    #num_warps = 4 if batch <= 512 else 8\n    num_warps = int(os.getenv(\"TRITON_MOE_MXFP4_NUM_WARPS\", 4))\n    assert num_warps in [4, 8], \\\n        f\"TRITON_MOE_MXFP4_NUM_WARPS should be 4 or 8, got {num_warps}\"\n    value_layout, value_layout_opts = layout.make_default_matmul_mxfp4_w_layout(\n        mx_axis=1)\n    scale_layout, scale_layout_opts = layout.make_default_matmul_mxfp4_w_scale_layout(\n        mx_axis=1, num_warps=num_warps)\n    # swizzling path is broken for H20\n    if torch.cuda.get_device_name() == \"NVIDIA H20\":\n        from triton_kernels.tensor_details.layout_details.strided import \\\n            StridedLayout\n        value_layout = StridedLayout\n        value_layout_opts = dict()\n        scale_layout = StridedLayout\n        scale_layout_opts = dict()\n\n    opt = {\"value_layout\": value_layout, \"value_layout_opts\": value_layout_opts, \\\n            \"scale_layout\": scale_layout, \"scale_layout_opts\": scale_layout_opts}\n\n    # w, w_scale = downcast_to_mxfp(tensor.to(torch.bfloat16), torch.uint8, axis=1)\n    w = convert_layout(wrap_torch_tensor(w, dtype=FP4), opt[\"value_layout\"],\n                       **opt[\"value_layout_opts\"])\n    w_scale = convert_layout(wrap_torch_tensor(w_scale), opt[\"scale_layout\"],\n                             **opt[\"scale_layout_opts\"])\n    return w, w_scale\n\n\ndef get_padded_size(size: int, padding: int) -> int:\n    return ((size + padding - 1) // padding) * padding\n\n\n# Pad both n and k dimensions, then shard along shard_axis\n# Handles weights, scales, and biases, which are expected to be 1D or 2D tensors.\ndef shard_and_pad_tensor(\n    tensor: torch.Tensor,\n    shard_axis: int,\n    n_alignment: int,\n    k_alignment: int,\n    tp_size: int,\n    tp_rank: int,\n    device: torch.device,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n    assert tensor.dim() in (1,\n                            2), \"Expecting single expect gemm weights or biases\"\n    assert shard_axis in (0, 1), \"Shard axis must be 0 or 1\"\n\n    padding = [n_alignment, k_alignment]\n    size_to_pad = [0] * 2\n\n    tensor = tensor.to(device)\n\n    # First we pad the sharded axis\n    if shard_axis < tensor.dim():\n        padded_size = get_padded_size(tensor.shape[shard_axis],\n                                      padding[shard_axis] * tp_size)\n        assert 0 <= tp_rank < tp_size\n        assert tensor.shape[shard_axis] <= padded_size\n        assert padded_size % tp_size == 0\n\n        shard_size = padded_size // tp_size\n        shard_start = tp_rank * shard_size\n        assert shard_start < tensor.shape[shard_axis]\n        shard_end = min(shard_start + shard_size, tensor.shape[shard_axis])\n        actual_size = shard_end - shard_start\n\n        tensor = tensor.narrow(shard_axis, shard_start, actual_size)\n        size_to_pad[shard_axis] = shard_size - actual_size\n\n    # Now we pad the non-sharded axis\n    non_shard_axis = 1 - shard_axis\n    if non_shard_axis < tensor.dim():\n        padded_size = get_padded_size(tensor.shape[non_shard_axis],\n                                      padding[non_shard_axis])\n        size_to_pad[non_shard_axis] = padded_size - tensor.shape[non_shard_axis]\n\n    # Actually call pad\n    if any(size_to_pad):\n        pad = (0, size_to_pad[0]) if tensor.dim() == 1 else (0, size_to_pad[1],\n                                                             0, size_to_pad[0])\n        tensor = torch.nn.functional.pad(tensor, pad)\n\n    return tensor\n\n\n# We inherit from TritonUnquantizedFusedMoEMethod to reuse the weight preprocessing logic\nclass TritonMXFP4FusedMoEMethod(TritonUnquantizedFusedMoEMethod):\n\n    def __init__(self, activation_dtype):\n        super().__init__(shuffle_weight=True)\n        assert activation_dtype in [torch.float8_e4m3fn, torch.bfloat16], \\\n            f\"TritonMXFP4FusedMoEMethod only supports float8_e4m3fn or bfloat16 activation, got {activation_dtype}\"\n        self.activation_dtype = activation_dtype\n\n        self.k_alignment = 128\n        self.n_alignment = 2 * self.k_alignment\n\n    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        weight_dtype = torch.uint8\n\n        # The Triton kernel accepts the w3_w1_weight in (num_experts, hidden_dim, intermediate_dim * 2) format\n        w3_w1_weight_shape = (\n            module.expert_size_per_partition,\n            get_padded_size(module.hidden_size, self.k_alignment) //\n            2,  # Two mxfp4 packed to a byte\n            get_padded_size(module.intermediate_size_per_partition * 2,\n                            self.n_alignment),\n        )\n\n        w3_w1_scale_shape = (\n            w3_w1_weight_shape[0],\n            w3_w1_weight_shape[1] //\n            16,  # block size of 32 for mxfp4, we already divided by 2 before so only divide by 16\n            w3_w1_weight_shape[2],\n        )\n\n        # The Triton kernel accepts the w2_weight in (num_experts, intermediate_dim, hidden_dim) format\n        w2_weight_shape = (\n            module.expert_size_per_partition,\n            get_padded_size(module.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n                            self.k_alignment) //\n            2,  # Two mxfp4 packed to a byte,\n            get_padded_size(module.hidden_size, self.n_alignment),\n        )\n\n        w2_scale_shape = (\n            w2_weight_shape[0],\n            w2_weight_shape[1] //\n            16,  # block size of 32 for mxfp4, we already divided by 2 before so only divide by 16\n            w2_weight_shape[2],\n        )\n\n        w3_w1_bias_shape = (w3_w1_weight_shape[0], w3_w1_weight_shape[2])\n        w2_bias_shape = (w2_weight_shape[0], w2_weight_shape[2])\n\n        FusedMoEMethodBase.create_weights(self,\n                                          module,\n                                          weight_dtype,\n                                          w3_w1_weight_shape,\n                                          w2_weight_shape,\n                                          bias_dtype=torch.float32,\n                                          w3_w1_bias_shape=w3_w1_bias_shape,\n                                          w2_bias_shape=w2_bias_shape)\n\n        fc31_dequant = nn.Parameter(\n            torch.empty(w3_w1_scale_shape, dtype=torch.uint8),  # mxfp8 scale\n            requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc31_dequant\", fc31_dequant)\n\n        fc2_dequant = nn.Parameter(\n            torch.empty(w2_scale_shape, dtype=torch.uint8),  # mxfp8 scale\n            requires_grad=False)\n        module.register_parameter(\"fc2_dequant\", fc2_dequant)\n\n        if self.activation_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n            fc31_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1.,\n                                                           dtype=torch.float32),\n                                              requires_grad=False)\n            module.register_parameter(\"fc31_input_dequant\", fc31_input_dequant)\n\n            fc2_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.tensor(1.,\n                                                          dtype=torch.float32),\n                                             requires_grad=False)\n            module.register_parameter(\"fc2_input_dequant\", fc2_input_dequant)\n\n        self.setup_quant_scales(module)\n\n    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):\n        module.quant_scales = TritonMXFP4FusedMoEQuantScales(\n            fc1_dequant=module.fc31_dequant,\n            fc2_dequant=module.fc2_dequant,\n            fc1_input_dequant=getattr(\n                module, 'fc31_input_dequant',\n                None),  # activation scale exists only for float8_e4m3fn\n            fc2_input_dequant=getattr(\n                module, 'fc2_input_dequant',\n                None),  # activation scale exists only for float8_e4m3fn\n        )\n\n    def load_expert_weights_to_dst(\n            self, module: torch.nn.Module, weights: List[Dict],\n            weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode,\n            load_expert_ids: List[int], dst_w3_w1_weights_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n            dst_w2_weights_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n            dst_w3_w1_bias_tensor: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n            dst_w2_bias_tensor: Optional[torch.Tensor]):\n        # dynamic quant scales for weights\n        self.w3_scales = {}\n        self.w1_scales = {}\n        self.w2_scales = {}\n        # Multithread weight load is superseded by prefetch_files() in model_engine.py\n        # Also, threading adds overhead in order to protect shuffle index cache with critical section.\n        for local_slot_id, expert_id in enumerate(load_expert_ids):\n            # expert_idx is the local slot index of current rank\n            expert_idx = local_slot_id\n\n            if weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n                w1_weight = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"]\n                w3_weight = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"]\n                w2_weight = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"]\n                if module.bias:\n                    w1_bias = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.bias\"]\n                    w3_bias = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.bias\"]\n                    w2_bias = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.bias\"]\n            elif weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.FUSED_GATE_UP_PROJ:\n                w1_w3_weight = weights[\"gate_up_proj\"][expert_id].transpose(\n                    0, 1)\n                w1_weight, w3_weight = w1_w3_weight.chunk(2, dim=0)\n                w2_weight = weights[\"down_proj\"][expert_id].transpose(\n                    0, 1).contiguous()\n                if module.bias:\n                    w1_w3_bias = weights[\"gate_up_proj.bias\"][expert_id]\n                    w1_bias, w3_bias = w1_w3_bias.chunk(2, dim=0)\n                    w2_bias = weights[\"down_proj.bias\"][expert_id]\n            else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unknown weight loading mode in MoE: {weight_loading_mode}\"\n                )\n\n            w3_scale, w1_scale = self.load_expert_w3_w1_weight(\n                module, w1_weight, w3_weight,\n                dst_w3_w1_weights_tensor[expert_idx])\n\n            w2_scale = self.load_expert_w2_weight(\n                module, w2_weight, dst_w2_weights_tensor[expert_idx])\n            if w3_scale is not None:\n                self.w3_scales[expert_id] = w3_scale\n            if w1_scale is not None:\n                self.w1_scales[expert_id] = w1_scale\n            if w2_scale is not None:\n                self.w2_scales[expert_id] = w2_scale\n\n            if module.bias:\n                self.load_expert_w3_w1_weight(\n                    module,\n                    w1_bias,\n                    w3_bias,\n                    dst_w3_w1_bias_tensor.data[expert_idx],\n                    is_bias=True)\n\n                self.load_expert_w2_weight(module,\n                                           w2_bias,\n                                           dst_w2_bias_tensor.data[expert_idx],\n                                           is_bias=True)\n\n    def _permute_mxfp4_quantize(self, tensor):\n        tensor = tensor.transpose(-2, -1).contiguous()\n        tensor_fp4, tensor_scales = downcast_to_mxfp_torch(tensor,\n                                                           torch.uint8,\n                                                           axis=-2)\n        return tensor_fp4, tensor_scales\n\n    def load_expert_w3_w1_weight(self,\n                                 module: torch.nn.Module,\n                                 w1_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 w3_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 dst_w3_w1_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                                 is_bias: bool = False):\n        \"\"\"\n        Load w1 and w3 weights for each expert.\n        \"\"\"\n        device = dst_w3_w1_weight.device\n        assert device.type == \"cuda\"\n        # Use full k-padding for float tensors, half for already-packed uint8\n        k_pad = self.k_alignment // 2 if w1_weight.dtype == torch.uint8 else self.k_alignment\n        # n is halved per-branch because we concatenate w1/w3 along N later\n        n_pad = self.n_alignment // 2\n        w1_weight_shard = shard_and_pad_tensor(w1_weight,\n                                               0,\n                                               n_pad,\n                                               k_pad,\n                                               module.tp_size,\n                                               module.tp_rank,\n                                               device=device)\n        w3_weight_shard = shard_and_pad_tensor(w3_weight,\n                                               0,\n                                               n_pad,\n                                               k_pad,\n                                               module.tp_size,\n                                               module.tp_rank,\n                                               device=device)\n\n        if not is_bias and w3_weight_shard.dtype in (torch.bfloat16,\n                                                     torch.float16,\n                                                     torch.float32):\n            # [N, K] -> [K, N]\n            w3_weight_shard, w3_scales = self._permute_mxfp4_quantize(\n                w3_weight_shard)\n            w1_weight_shard, w1_scales = self._permute_mxfp4_quantize(\n                w1_weight_shard)\n            cat_dim = 1\n        else:\n            # [N, K]\n            w3_scales = None\n            w1_scales = None\n            cat_dim = 0\n\n        w31_weight_shard = torch.cat([w3_weight_shard, w1_weight_shard],\n                                     dim=cat_dim)\n\n        # This function is shared by weights and biases, we only do transpose for weights\n        if not is_bias and cat_dim == 0:\n            # Transpose the weights to match the expected format for the Triton gemm kernel\n            w31_weight_shard = w31_weight_shard.transpose(0, 1).contiguous()\n        else:\n            # We use .to here since for Triton the bias is always in float32 and a conversion is needed.\n            w31_weight_shard = w31_weight_shard.to(dst_w3_w1_weight.dtype)\n\n        if self.shuffle_weight:\n            w31_weight_shard = shuffle_weight_for_activation_kernel(\n                w31_weight_shard)\n\n        dst_w3_w1_weight.copy_(w31_weight_shard, non_blocking=True)\n        return (w3_scales, w1_scales)\n\n    def load_expert_w2_weight(self,\n                              module: torch.nn.Module,\n                              w2_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                              dst_w2_weight: torch.Tensor,\n                              is_bias: bool = False):\n        \"\"\"\n        Load w2 weight for each expert.\n        Override this method if you need to preprocess the weights differently.\n        \"\"\"\n        device = dst_w2_weight.device\n        assert device.type == \"cuda\"\n        k_pad = self.k_alignment // 2 if w2_weight.dtype == torch.uint8 else self.k_alignment\n        w2_weight_shard = shard_and_pad_tensor(w2_weight,\n                                               1,\n                                               self.n_alignment,\n                                               k_pad,\n                                               module.tp_size,\n                                               module.tp_rank,\n                                               device=device)\n        w2_scales = None\n\n        if is_bias:\n            # We use .to here since for Triton the bias is always in float32 and a conversion is needed.\n            w2_weight_shard = w2_weight_shard.to(dst_w2_weight.dtype)\n            assert w2_weight_shard.dim() == 1\n            # Handle TP contribution of bias\n            w2_weight_shard /= module.tp_size\n        else:\n            if w2_weight_shard.dtype in (torch.bfloat16, torch.float16,\n                                         torch.float32):\n                # [N, K] -> [K, N]\n                w2_weight_shard, w2_scales = self._permute_mxfp4_quantize(\n                    w2_weight_shard)\n            else:\n                # Transpose the weights to match the expected format for the Triton gemm kernel\n                # [N, K] -> [K, N]\n                w2_weight_shard = w2_weight_shard.transpose(0, 1).contiguous()\n\n        dst_w2_weight.copy_(w2_weight_shard, non_blocking=True)\n\n        return w2_scales\n\n    def _load_expert_w3_w1_weight_scale_mxfp4(\n            self, module: torch.nn.Module, w1_weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n            w3_weight_scale: torch.Tensor, dst_w3_w1_weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n            transpose_scales: bool):\n        if transpose_scales:\n            w1_weight_scale = w1_weight_scale.transpose(\n                0, 1)  # (hidden_dim / 32, intermediate_dim)\n            w3_weight_scale = w3_weight_scale.transpose(\n                0, 1)  # (hidden_dim / 32, intermediate_dim)\n\n        # Swapping n_alignment and k_alignment here because we have already transposed\n        w1_weight_scale = shard_and_pad_tensor(\n            w1_weight_scale,\n            1,\n            self.k_alignment // 32,\n            self.n_alignment // 2,\n            module.tp_size,\n            module.tp_rank,\n            device=dst_w3_w1_weight_scale.device)\n\n        w3_weight_scale = shard_and_pad_tensor(\n            w3_weight_scale,\n            1,\n            self.k_alignment // 32,\n            self.n_alignment // 2,\n            module.tp_size,\n            module.tp_rank,\n            device=dst_w3_w1_weight_scale.device)\n\n        # (hidden_dim / 32, intermediate_dim * 2)\n        combined_scale = torch.cat([w3_weight_scale, w1_weight_scale], dim=1)\n\n        dst_w3_w1_weight_scale.copy_(combined_scale, non_blocking=True)\n\n    def _load_expert_w2_weight_scale_mxfp4(self, module: torch.nn.Module,\n                                           w2_weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n                                           dst_w2_weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n                                           transpose_scales: bool):\n        if transpose_scales:\n            w2_weight_scale = w2_weight_scale.transpose(\n                0, 1)  # (intermediate_dim / 32, hidden_dim)\n\n        # k_alignment is divided by 32 because every 32 values share a single scale\n        # Swapping n_alignment and k_alignment here because we have already transposed\n        w2_weight_scale = shard_and_pad_tensor(\n            w2_weight_scale,\n            0,\n            self.k_alignment // 32,\n            self.n_alignment,\n            module.tp_size,\n            module.tp_rank,\n            device=dst_w2_weight_scale.device)\n\n        dst_w2_weight_scale.copy_(w2_weight_scale, non_blocking=True)\n\n    def load_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module, weights: Dict):\n        # Step1: Load input scales.\n        if self.activation_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n            try:\n                max_fc31_input_scale, max_fc2_input_scale = load_activation_scales_fp8_qdq(\n                    module, weights)\n            except KeyError:\n                # We will use dynamic quantization\n                max_fc31_input_scale = None\n                max_fc2_input_scale = None\n\n        # Step2: Load weight scales\n        device = module.w3_w1_weight.device\n        tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale = torch.empty(module.fc31_dequant.shape,\n                                             dtype=torch.uint8,\n                                             device=device)\n        tmp_w2_weight_scale = torch.empty(module.fc2_dequant.shape,\n                                          dtype=torch.uint8,\n                                          device=device)\n        for local_slot_id, expert_id in enumerate(\n                module.initial_local_expert_ids):\n            try:\n                if module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n                    w1_weight_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale\"]\n                    w3_weight_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale\"]\n                    w2_weight_scale = weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale\"]\n                    need_to_transpose_scales = True\n                elif module.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.FUSED_GATE_UP_PROJ:\n                    # Reverse-engineered from the openai modeling class\n                    combined_weight_scale = weights[\n                        \"gate_up_proj_weight_scale\"][expert_id]\n                    out_dim = combined_weight_scale.shape[-1]\n                    w1_weight_scale = combined_weight_scale[..., :out_dim // 2]\n                    w3_weight_scale = combined_weight_scale[..., out_dim // 2:]\n                    w2_weight_scale = weights[f\"down_proj_weight_scale\"][\n                        expert_id]\n                    need_to_transpose_scales = False\n                else:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        f\"Unknown weight loading mode in MoE: {module.weight_loading_mode}\"\n                    )\n            except KeyError:\n                # We will use dynamic quantization\n                w1_weight_scale = self.w1_scales[expert_id]\n                w3_weight_scale = self.w3_scales[expert_id]\n                w2_weight_scale = self.w2_scales[expert_id]\n                need_to_transpose_scales = False\n\n            expert_idx = local_slot_id\n\n            self._load_expert_w3_w1_weight_scale_mxfp4(\n                module, w1_weight_scale, w3_weight_scale,\n                tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale[expert_idx], need_to_transpose_scales)\n\n            self._load_expert_w2_weight_scale_mxfp4(\n                module, w2_weight_scale, tmp_w2_weight_scale[expert_idx],\n                need_to_transpose_scales)\n\n        self.w1_scales.clear()\n        self.w3_scales.clear()\n        self.w2_scales.clear()\n\n        # Scales need to be shuffled as well\n        tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale = shuffle_weight_for_activation_kernel(\n            tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale)\n\n        # Handle w3_w1_weight\n        tmp_w3_w1_weight, tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale = swizzle_weight_and_scale(\n            module.w3_w1_weight.data, tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale)\n\n        module._parameters.pop('w3_w1_weight', None)\n        module._parameters.pop('fc31_dequant', None)\n        torch.cuda.empty_cache()\n\n        module.w3_w1_weight = tmp_w3_w1_weight\n        module.fc31_dequant = tmp_w3_w1_weight_scale\n\n        # Handle w2_weight\n        tmp_w2_weight, tmp_w2_weight_scale = swizzle_weight_and_scale(\n            module.w2_weight.data, tmp_w2_weight_scale)\n\n        module._parameters.pop('w2_weight', None)\n        module._parameters.pop('fc2_dequant', None)\n        torch.cuda.empty_cache()\n\n        module.w2_weight = tmp_w2_weight\n        module.fc2_dequant = tmp_w2_weight_scale\n\n        if self.activation_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n            if max_fc31_input_scale is None or max_fc2_input_scale is None:\n                module.fc31_input_dequant = None\n                module.fc2_input_dequant = None\n            else:\n                module.fc31_input_dequant.data.copy_(max_fc31_input_scale,\n                                                     non_blocking=True)\n                module.fc2_input_dequant.data.copy_(max_fc2_input_scale,\n                                                    non_blocking=True)\n\n    def apply(self, module: torch.nn.Module, x: torch.Tensor,\n              router_logits: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n        # Fetch all the data needed for the Triton kernel\n        if self.activation_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n            if module.fc31_input_dequant is None:\n                hidden_states, hidden_states_scale = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x)\n            else:\n                hidden_states, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, module.fc31_input_dequant)\n                hidden_states_scale = module.fc31_input_dequant\n        else:\n            hidden_states = x\n        expert_logits = router_logits\n        gemm1_weights = module.w3_w1_weight\n        gemm1_scales = module.fc31_dequant\n        gemm2_weights = module.w2_weight\n        gemm2_scales = module.fc2_dequant\n        top_k = module.routing_method.experts_per_token\n\n        # hidden_states: (num_tokens, hidden_dim) torch.float8_e4m3fn\n        # hidden_states_scale: (,) torch.float32\n        # expert_logits: (num_tokens, num_experts) torch.bfloat16\n        # gemm1_weights: (num_experts, hidden_dim / 2, intermediate_dim * 2) torch.uint8\n        # gemm1_scales: (num_experts, hidden_dim / 32, intermediate_dim * 2) torch.uint8\n        # gemm2_weights: (num_experts, intermediate_dim / 2, hidden_dim) torch.uint8\n        # gemm2_scales: (num_experts, intermediate_dim / 32, hidden_dim) torch.float32\n\n        # Step 1: Routing\n        num_experts = expert_logits.shape[1]\n        if num_experts > 1:\n            rdata, gather_indx, scatter_indx = TritonEPRouter()(\n                expert_logits,\n                top_k,\n                ep=module.ep_size,\n                node_idx=module.ep_rank)\n        else:\n            rdata, gather_indx, scatter_indx = None, None, None\n\n        # Step 2: Gemm1\n        # Setup quantization context\n        def _maybe_pad_activation(hidden_states):\n            k_dim = hidden_states.shape[-1]\n            padded_k_dim = get_padded_size(k_dim, self.k_alignment)\n            hidden_states = torch.nn.functional.pad(hidden_states,\n                                                    (0, padded_k_dim - k_dim))\n            return hidden_states\n\n        if self.activation_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n            flex_ctx_1 = FlexCtx(\n                lhs_data=InFlexData(scale=hidden_states_scale), )\n        else:\n            flex_ctx_1 = FlexCtx()\n        pc1 = PrecisionConfig(weight_scale=gemm1_scales,\n                              flex_ctx=flex_ctx_1,\n                              allow_tf32=False,\n                              out_dtype=module.dtype)\n\n        # Call the Triton gemm kernel, which also does permutation and activation\n        alpha = module.swiglu_alpha or 1.0\n        beta = module.swiglu_beta or 0.0\n        hidden_states = _maybe_pad_activation(hidden_states)\n        if beta == 1.0:\n            act = FusedActivation(\n                FnSpecs(\"swiglu\", triton_kernels.swiglu.swiglu_fn,\n                        (\"alpha\", \"limit\")), (alpha, module.swiglu_limit), 2)\n\n            act_out = matmul_ogs(hidden_states,\n                                 gemm1_weights,\n                                 module.w3_w1_bias if module.bias else None,\n                                 rdata,\n                                 gather_indx=gather_indx,\n                                 precision_config=pc1,\n                                 fused_activation=act)\n        else:\n            act_out = matmul_ogs(hidden_states,\n                                 gemm1_weights,\n                                 module.w3_w1_bias if module.bias else None,\n                                 rdata,\n                                 gather_indx=gather_indx,\n                                 precision_config=pc1)\n            act_out = swiglu_torch(act_out, alpha, beta, module.swiglu_limit)\n\n        if self.activation_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n            # Quantize the activation output manually since the Triton activation kernel doesn't support bf16 in fp8 out\n            if module.fc2_input_dequant is None:\n                act_out, act_scale = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    act_out)\n            else:\n                act_out, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    act_out, module.fc2_input_dequant)\n                act_scale = module.fc2_input_dequant\n\n        # Step 3: Gemm2\n        # Setup quantization context\n        if self.activation_dtype == torch.float8_e4m3fn:\n            flex_ctx_2 = FlexCtx(lhs_data=InFlexData(scale=act_scale), )\n        else:\n            flex_ctx_2 = FlexCtx()\n        pc2 = PrecisionConfig(weight_scale=gemm2_scales,\n                              flex_ctx=flex_ctx_2,\n                              allow_tf32=False,\n                              out_dtype=module.dtype)\n\n        # Call the Triton kernel, which also does finalization\n        gemm2_output = matmul_ogs(act_out,\n                                  gemm2_weights,\n                                  module.w2_bias if module.bias else None,\n                                  rdata,\n                                  scatter_indx=scatter_indx,\n                                  precision_config=pc2,\n                                  gammas=rdata.gate_scal if rdata else None)\n\n        def _maybe_remove_padding(gemm_output, expected_size):\n            assert gemm_output.dim() == 2\n            if gemm_output.shape[-1] != expected_size:\n                assert gemm_output.shape[\n                    -1] % self.k_alignment == 0, \"The padding is not done correctly\"\n                gemm_output = gemm_output[:, :expected_size]\n            return gemm_output\n\n        gemm2_output = _maybe_remove_padding(gemm2_output, module.hidden_size)\n\n \"\"\"\n        from tensorrt_llm._utils import get_sm_version\n        from tensorrt_llm.models.modeling_utils import QuantAlgo\n\n        from .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # TritonFusedMoE only supports SM90\n        if sm_version != 90:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TritonFusedMoE only supports SM90, got SM{sm_version}\")\n\n        # TritonFusedMoE ONLY supports gptoss_style=True\n        if not gptoss_style:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                \"TritonFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style=True\")\n\n        # Unquantized mode - only bfloat16 is supported\n        if quant_algo is None:\n            if dtype_activation != torch.bfloat16:\n                return None\n\n        # W4A16_MXFP4 - only bfloat16 and float16 are supported\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            if dtype_activation not in {torch.bfloat16, torch.float16}:\n .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE requires SM in {100, 103}\n        if sm_version not in {100, 103}:\n            return         else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unsupported quantization method by TRTLLMGenFusedMoE: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n                )\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't support fp16/bf16/fp32 MoE.\")\n\n    def create_weights(self):\n        if self._weights_created:\n            return\n\n        self.quant_method = self._get_quant_method()\n        self.quant_method.create_weights(self)\n\n        self._weights_created = True\n        self._check_configs()\n\n        if (self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8) and not self.bias:\n            self.w3_w1_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(\n                (self.w3_w1_weight.shape[0], self.w3_w1_weight.shape[1]),\n                dtype=torch.float32),\n                                           requires_grad=False)\n            self.register_parameter(\"w3_w1_bias\", self.w3_w1_bias)\n            self.w2_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(\n                (self.w2_weight.shape[0], self.w2_weight.shape[1]),\n                dtype=torch.float32),\n                                        requires_grad=False)\n            self.register_parameter(\"w2_bias\", self.w2_bias)\n\n    def load_weights(self,\n                     weights: List[Dict],\n                     allow_partial_loading: bool = False):\n        assert self._weights_created\n\n        assert len(weights) == 1\n        weights = weights[0]\n\n        kargs = {}\n        if \"allow_partial_loading\" in inspect.getfullargspec(\n                self.quant_method.load_weights).args:\n            kargs[\"allow_partial_loading\"] = allow_partial_loading\n        self.quant_method.load_weights(self, weights, self.weight_loading_mode,\n                                       **kargs)\n\n    def post_load_weights(self):\n        self.quant_method.post_load_weights(self)\n\n    def quantize_input(self, x, post_quant_comm: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"Quantize inputs prior to post-communication (alltoall/allgather) or before MoE computation.\n\n        Args:\n            x: Input tensor to quantize\n            post_quant_comm:\n                If True, quantize for post-quant communication path.\n                If False, quantize for non-communication path\n\n        Returns: (x, x_sf) where x_sf is already reshaped to 2D if needed\n\n        For quantization methods that produce scaling factors:\n        - x_sf is reshaped from 1D to 2D: [num_elements] -> [batch_size, ceil_div(hidden_size, scaling_vector_size)]\n        - The 2D shape is required for proper handling in alltoall/allgather operations\n        - scaling_vector_size is typically the group size for block-wise quantization\n        \"\"\"\n        x_sf = None\n        if self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n            if post_quant_comm:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_dequant[0])\n            else:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_gate_dequant[0])\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            if isinstance(x, Fp4QuantizedTensor):\n                assert not x.is_sf_swizzled, \"Fp4QuantizedTensor should not be swizzled before communication\"\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = x.fp4_tensor, x.scaling_factor\n            else:\n                # Apply pre_quant_scale if it exists (for NVFP4_AWQ)\n                # fc31_act_scale shape: (1, hidden_size)\n                # x shape: (num_tokens, hidden_size)\n                if hasattr(\n                        self,\n                        'fc31_act_scale') and self.fc31_act_scale is not None:\n                    x = x * self.fc31_act_scale\n\n                pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n                if pad_size > 0:\n                    x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_scale, self.scaling_vector_size, False,\n                    False)\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.mxfp8_quantize(\n                x, False, alignment=self.quant_method.input_hidden_alignment)\n            x_row, x_col = x.shape[0], x.shape[1]\n        elif self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n            # For SM100+, fp8_quantize_1x128 returns x_sf with shape (blocked_n, num_tokens),\n            # but moe_a2a_dispatch requires all payloads to have first dim = num_tokens.\n            # Transpose x_sf before dispatch and transpose back after receive, but this may\n            # introduce perf regression. So we don't supports post_quant_comm for fp8_block_scales.\n            # TODO: Consider remove the constraint of the OneSided AlltoAll\n            pass\n        elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n        elif self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                x, 1.0 / self.fc31_input_scale)\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(\n                f\"unsupported quantization mode for post communication: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n            )\n\n        if x_sf is not None:\n            x_sf = x_sf.view(x_row, -1)\n\n        return x, x_sf\n\n    def supports_moe_output_in_alltoall_workspace(self):\n        return self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8\n\n    def run_moe(\n        self,\n        x: torch.Tensor,\n        token_selected_experts: torch.Tensor,\n        token_final_scales: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n        x_sf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        router_logits: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, tuple]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Run MoE computation with TRTLLMGen backend.\n\n        This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different\n        quantization schemes (fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_nvfp4_fp8,\n        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).\n\n        Args:\n            # Standard MoE interface parameters:\n            x: Input hidden states (may be pre-quantized)\n            token_selected_experts: Expert IDs [num_tokens, top_k]. If EPLB is enabled,\n                                    this represents expert slots [num_tokens, top_k] instead.\n            token_final_scales: Final scaling factors for each token\n            x_sf: Input scale factors (optional, for certain quantization schemes)\n\n            # TRTLLMGen-specific additional parameters:\n            router_logits: Router logits for integrated routing in some kernels.\n                          Should be None if routing has already been done (e.g., post_quant_comm).\n            do_finalize: Whether to finalize the output. If False, returns intermediate\n                        results (tuple) for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8 schemes.\n            moe_output: Pre-allocated output buffer from workspace (optional).\n                       Used for mnnvlthroughput alltoall backend to avoid extra copies.\n\n        Returns:\n            If do_finalize=True: final_hidden_states tensor\n            If do_finalize=False: tuple of intermediate outputs (for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8)\n        \"\"\"\n        # Extract routing parameters from routing_method\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n            routing_bias = self.routing_method.e_score_correction_bias\n            n_group = self.routing_method.routing_impl.n_group\n            topk_group = self.routing_method.routing_impl.topk_group\n            routed_scaling_factor = self.routing_method.routing_impl.routed_scaling_factor\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n            routing_bias = None\n            n_group = None\n            topk_group = None\n            routed_scaling_factor = None\n\n        routing_bias = routing_bias if router_logits is not None else None\n\n        # Ensure x_sf is 2D before flattening\n        if x_sf is not None:\n            assert len(\n                x_sf.shape\n            ) == 2, f\"x_sf should be 2D tensor, got shape {x_sf.shape}\"\n            x_sf = x_sf.flatten()\n\n        if self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n            assert do_finalize, \"fp8_block_scale_moe_runner does not support do_finalize=False\"\n            # fp8_block_scale_moe_runner needs 2D shape for x_sf and only support SM100+\n            if x_sf is None:\n                x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_quantize_1x128(x)\n\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scaling_factor,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scaling_factor,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                self.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            factor = 1 if self.activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2 else 2\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // factor\n            act_type = self._to_trtllm_gen_activation_type(self.activation_type)\n            outputs = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w3_w1_bias if self.bias else None,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w2_bias if self.bias else None,\n                self.fc31_scale_c.data,\n                self.fc31_alpha.data,\n                self.fc2_alpha.data,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                act_type=act_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n\n            if not do_finalize:\n                assert not self.reduce_results, \"reduce_results must be False when do_finalize is False\"\n                return outputs\n            else:\n                final_hidden_states = outputs[0]\n                # Slice output if it was padded\n                if final_hidden_states.shape[1] > self.hidden_size:\n                    final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                              hidden_size].contiguous(\n                                                              )\n        elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.bf16_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n            )\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                      hidden_size].contiguous()\n        elif self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n\n            outputs = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_fp4_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.fc31_scale_c.data,\n                self.fc31_alpha.data,\n                self.fc2_alpha.data,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                self.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                act_type=0,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n            )\n\n            if not do_finalize:\n                assert not self.reduce_results, \"reduce_results must be False when do_finalize is False\"\n                return outputs\n            else:\n                final_hidden_states = outputs[0]\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.e4m3_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.fc31_input_dequant,\n                self.fc31_input_gate_dequant,\n                self.fc2_input_dequant,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n            )\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                      hidden_size].contiguous()\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n\n            mxfp8_x, sf = x, x_sf\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n\n            result = torch.ops.trtllm.mxe4m3_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n                output=moe_output,\n            )\n\n            # When output is provided, use it directly as the result\n            # (custom op returns empty tensor to avoid PyTorch aliasing constraints)\n            final_hidden_states = moe_output if moe_output is not None else result\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scaling, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8 and w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 dtypes.\"\n            )\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_impl(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n        # Get top_k for routing (other routing parameters are extracted inside run_moe)\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n\n        run_post_quant_allgather = (self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n                                    and not self.enable_alltoall)\n        post_quant_comm = run_post_quant_allgather or self.enable_alltoall\n\n        x_sf = None\n        token_selected_experts = None\n        token_final_scales = None\n        token_count = x.shape[0]\n        alltoall_info = None\n        # Determine if this is first/last call (TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't use chunking)\n        is_first_call = self.repeat_idx == 0\n        is_last_call = self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1\n\n        if post_quant_comm:\n            self._load_balancer_start_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = self.routing_method.apply(\n                router_logits)\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_experts.to(torch.int32)\n            if token_final_scales is not None:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n\n            self._load_balancer_done_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            ignore_allreduce = self.enable_alltoall and self.alltoall_method_type in (\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided,\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided,\n            )\n            self._load_balancer_update_statistic(\n                token_selected_experts,\n                is_first_call,\n                is_last_call,\n                ignore_allreduce=ignore_allreduce)\n\n            # Route tokens to slots\n            token_selected_slots = self._load_balancer_route(\n                token_selected_experts, self.use_dp)\n\n            # Update expert statistics\n            ExpertStatistic.set_layer(self.layer_idx)\n            ExpertStatistic.maybe_add_info(self.num_slots, token_selected_slots)\n\n            # Use routed slots for subsequent processing\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_slots\n\n            x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            assert all_rank_num_tokens is not None, \"all_rank_num_tokens required for alltoall\"\n\n            runtime_max_tokens_per_rank = max(\n                all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else token_count\n\n            if token_final_scales is None:\n                token_final_scales = torch.ones_like(token_selected_experts,\n                                                     dtype=torch.float32)\n            else:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.float32)\n\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                assert self.alltoall_prepare_workspace is not None, \"alltoall_prepare_workspace should be initialized\"\n                if is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                else:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                alltoall_info, gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv_prepare_without_allgather(\n                    token_selected_experts,\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    self.alltoall_prepare_workspace,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size,\n                    self.num_experts,\n                    self.num_slots,\n                    top_k,\n                )\n                if gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info.view(\n                        (self.mapping.moe_ep_size, self.num_experts))\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv(\n                    [x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales],\n                    alltoall_info,\n                    self.alltoall_workspace,\n                    self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size,\n                )\n\n                torch.ops.trtllm.memset_expert_ids(\n                    token_selected_experts,\n                    alltoall_info.recv_rank_count_cumsum,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    top_k,\n                    -1,  # Caution: TRTLLM-Gen uses -1 as invalid token expert id\n                    self.ep_size,\n                )\n\n                if token_final_scales is not None:\n                    token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n            elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                payloads = []\n                payloads.append(x)\n                if x_sf is not None:\n                    payloads.append(x_sf)\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 2\n                else:\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 1\n                payloads.append(token_selected_experts)\n                payloads.append(token_final_scales)\n\n                loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                if self.layer_load_balancer and is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                if loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    recv_tensors = self.moe_a2a.dispatch(\n                        token_selected_experts,\n                        payloads,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        invalid_token_expert_id=\n                        -1,  # Caution: TRTLLM-Gen uses -1 as invalid token expert id\n                        expert_id_payload_index=expert_id_payload_index,\n                        eplb_local_stats=loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    )\n                    gathered_stats = self.moe_a2a._state.eplb_gathered_stats\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_stats)\n                else:\n                    recv_tensors = self.moe_a2a.dispatch(\n                        token_selected_experts,\n                        payloads,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        invalid_token_expert_id=\n                        -1,  # Caution: TRTLLM-Gen uses -1 as invalid token expert id\n                        expert_id_payload_index=expert_id_payload_index,\n                    )\n\n                if x_sf is not None:\n                    x_recv, x_sf_recv, token_selected_experts_recv, token_final_scales_recv = recv_tensors\n                    x_sf = x_sf_recv.view(-1, x_sf_recv.shape[-1])\n                else:\n                    x_recv, token_selected_experts_recv, token_final_scales_recv = recv_tensors\n                x = x_recv.view(-1, x_recv.shape[-1])\n                token_selected_experts = token_selected_experts_recv.view(\n                    -1, token_selected_experts_recv.shape[-1])\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales_recv.view(\n                    -1, token_final_scales_recv.shape[-1])\n\n                if token_final_scales is not None:\n                    token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Unsupported moe alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type}\"\n                )\n\n        elif run_post_quant_allgather:\n            if x_sf is not None:\n                assert len(\n                    x_sf.shape\n                ) == 2, \"The hidden states scaling factor should be 2D tensor before allgather\"\n            x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = allgather(\n                [x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales],\n                self.mapping,\n                dim=0,\n                sizes=None if use_dp_padding else all_rank_num_tokens)\n        else:\n            # No communication path: use non-post-quant-comm quantization\n            x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x, post_quant_comm=False)\n\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None\n        use_workspace_output = False\n        # TODO: use_workspace_output only supports w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8 (gpt-oss) for now\n        if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided and self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            moe_output = self.moe_a2a.get_combine_payload_tensor_in_workspace(\n                runtime_max_tokens_per_rank, self.hidden_size, torch.bfloat16)\n            use_workspace_output = True\n\n        # Call the extracted run_moe interface\n        # Determine router_logits based Combine results if using alltoall\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                if alltoall_info is not None:\n                    final_hidden_states = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv_combine(\n                        final_hidden_states,\n                        alltoall_info,\n use_low_precision_combine=self.\n                        use_low_precision_combine,\n                        token_count=token_count,\n                    )\n            elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                # If use_workspace_output=True, the MoE result is already in workspace\n                # Otherwise, we need to reshape and pass it\n                if use_workspace_output:\n                    # Workspace payload is returned as 2D [ep_size * max_tokens, hidden]; reshape to 3D.\n                    hidden = final_hidden_states.shape[-1]\n                    payload = moe_output.view(self.ep_size,\n                                              runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                                              hidden)\n                    final_hidden_states = self.moe_a2a.combine(\n                        payload,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        payload_in_workspace=True)\n                else:\n                    hidden = final_hidden_states.shape[-1]\n                    payload = final_hidden_states.view(\n                        self.ep_size, runtime_max_tokens_per_rank, hidden)\n                    final_hidden_states = self.moe_a2a.combine(\n                        payload,\n                        runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                        payload_in_workspace=False)\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    f\"Unsupported moe alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type}\"\n                )\n\n        final_hidden_states = self.reducescatter_or_allreduce(\n            final_hidden_states,\n            all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens,\n            use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding,\n        )\n\n        self._load_balancer_done_set_cpu_stage(is_last_call)\n\n        if use_dp_padding:\n            rank = self.parallel_rank\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:\n                                                      all_rank_num_tokens[rank]]\n\n        # Update repeat index for load balancer\n        if self.layer_load_balancer:\n            self.repeat_idx = 0 if self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1 else self.repeat_idx + 1\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_fake(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        output_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, List[torch.Tensor]]:\n        if do_finalize:\n            # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports bfloat16 output\n            return super().forward_fake(x,\n                                        router_logits,\n                                        do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                                        output_dtype=torch.bfloat16,\n                                        all_rank_num_tokens=all_rank_num_tokens,\n                                        use_dp_padding=use_dp_padding,\n overlapping.\n\n    MoE torch custom op:\n        Only support min-latency mode now (SM100 Blackwell only).\n        Quant: fp8 block scales quant and nvfp4 quant and w4a16_mxfp4 quant\n            FusedMoE Op: routing(topK, etc.) + scatter + gemm1 + swiglu + gemm2 + finalize MoeRoute\n\n    FusedMoE module:\n        min-latency mode:\n            dynamic quant + FusedMoe Op\n            equals so any necessary AllReduce operations must be added explicitly in the model definition.\n    AttentionDP should be turned off for min-latency mode.\n\n    When we have redundant expert, we have more weight slots than `num_experts`, in that case, we separate the concepts of expert and slot.\n    Expert is the concept from model's perspective while slot is the concept from model engine's perspective.\n    There should be at lease `num_experts` slots in the model engine. .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE requires SM in {100, 103}\n        if sm_version not in {100, 103}:\n            return dtype_activation != torch.bfloat16:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports bfloat16 activation, got {dtype_activation}\"\n            )\n\n        #       # Check if quant_algo is supported\n        if quant_algo not in cls._SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n        # Check gptoss_style support: only supported for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants\n        if gptoss_style and quant_algo not in cls._GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS:\n \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support SM120 and above.\")\n\n        assert not self.smart_router, \"Smart router is not supported in TRTLLMGenFusedMoE.\"\n\n        # Note: Load balancer initialization is handled by base class _init_load_balancer()\n        # If no load balancer is available, the base class will set:\n        # - self.num_slots = self.num_experts\n        # - workspace_size_per_rank=workspace_size,\n                        num_experts=self.num_experts\n                        if self.layer_load_balancer else None)\n                elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.DeepEP or self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.DeepEPLowLatency:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        \"DeepEP and DeepEPLowLatency are not supported for TRTLLMGenFusedMoE yet\"\n                    )\n                else:\n                    raise NotImplementedError(\n                        f\"Unsupported alltoall method type: {self.alltoall_method_type!r}\"\n                    )\n        else:\n            # When without_comm=True, set minimal attributes\n            # Communication
