self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = None\n            self.use_low_precision_combine = False\n            self.moe_a2a = None\n\n        self._weights_created = False\n        if not model_config.skip_create_weights_in_init:\n            self.create_weights()\n\n    def _to_trtllm_gen_activation_type(self,\n                                       activation_type: ActivationType) -> int:\n        if activation_type == ActivationType.Swiglu:\n            return 0\n        elif activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2:\n            return 1\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported activation type: {activation_type}\")\n\n    def select_alltoall_method_type(self) -> AlltoallMethodType:\n        # If no attention DP, no need to use AlltoAll.\n        if self.mapping.dp_size == 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        # AlltoAll cannot support MoE TP.\n        if self.mapping.moe_tp_size != 1:\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        if not MnnvlMemory.supports_mnnvl():\n            return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n        all2all_method_type = os.environ.get(\"TRTLLM_FORCE_ALLTOALL_METHOD\")\n        if all2all_method_type is not None:\n            if AlltoallMethodType[all2all_method_type] in [\n                    AlltoallMethodType.DeepEP,\n                    AlltoallMethodType.DeepEPLowLatency\n            ]:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    \"DeepEP and DeepEPLowLatency are not supported for CutlassFusedMoE yet\"\n                )\n            return AlltoallMethodType[all2all_method_type]\n\n        # We found that NVLinkOneSided performs better than NCCL AllGather/ReduceScatter,\n        # regardless of the relationship between EP size and topK. We favor NVLinkOneSided for now.\n        # if not self.mapping.moe_ep_size > self.routing_method.experts_per_token:\n        #     return AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n        return AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided\n\n    def _supports_load_balancer(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE supports load balancer.\"\"\"\n        return self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n\n    @cached_property\n    def enable_alltoall(self):\n        \"\"\" enable_alltoall (bool): whether to enable alltoall instead of allgather/reducescatter\n        \"\"\"\n        return self.alltoall_method_type != AlltoallMethodType.NotEnabled\n\n    def _check_configs(self):\n        assert self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales \\\n            or self.has_nvfp4 or self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8 \\\n            or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8, \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scaling, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 and w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8 dtypes.\"\n\n        if self.bias or self.swiglu_alpha is not None or self.swiglu_beta is not None or self.swiglu_limit is not None:\n            assert self.has_nvfp4 or self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8, \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE supports bias/swiglu only for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants.\"\n\n    def _get_quant_method(self):\n        if self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_any_quant(\n                exclude_kv_cache=True):\n            if self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales():\n                return DeepSeekFP8BlockScalesFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_nvfp4():\n                return NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod(\n                ) if self.swiglu_alpha is not None or self.activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2 else NVFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEBaseMethod(\n                )\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():\n                return W4A16MXFP4TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8NVFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4FP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():\n                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8TRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod()\n            else:\n                raise NotImplementedError(\n                    f\"Unsupported quantization method by TRTLLMGenFusedMoE: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n                )\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't support fp16/bf16/fp32 MoE.\")\n\n    def create_weights(self):\n        if self._weights_created:\n            return\n\n        self.quant_method = self._get_quant_method()\n        self.quant_method.create_weights(self)\n\n        self._weights_created = True\n        self._check_configs()\n\n        if (self.has_w4a16_mxfp4 or self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8\n                or self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8) and not self.bias:\n            self.w3_w1_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(\n                (self.w3_w1_weight.shape[0], self.w3_w1_weight.shape[1]),\n                dtype=torch.float32),\n                                           requires_grad=False)\n            self.register_parameter(\"w3_w1_bias\", self.w3_w1_bias)\n            self.w2_bias = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(\n                (self.w2_weight.shape[0], self.w2_weight.shape[1]),\n                dtype=torch.float32),\n                                        requires_grad=False)\n            self.register_parameter(\"w2_bias\", self.w2_bias)\n\n    def load_weights(self,\n                     weights: List[Dict],\n                     allow_partial_loading: bool = False):\n        assert self._weights_created\n\n        assert len(weights) == 1\n        weights = weights[0]\n\n        kargs = {}\n        if \"allow_partial_loading\" in inspect.getfullargspec(\n                self.quant_method.load_weights).args:\n            kargs[\"allow_partial_loading\"] = allow_partial_loading\n        self.quant_method.load_weights(self, weights, self.weight_loading_mode,\n                                       **kargs)\n\n    def post_load_weights(self):\n        self.quant_method.post_load_weights(self)\n\n    def quantize_input(self, x, post_quant_comm: bool = True):\n        \"\"\"Quantize inputs prior to post-communication (alltoall/allgather) or before MoE computation.\n\n        Args:\n            x: Input tensor to quantize\n            post_quant_comm:\n                If True, quantize for post-quant communication path.\n                If False, quantize for non-communication path\n\n        Returns: (x, x_sf) where x_sf is already reshaped to 2D if needed\n\n        For quantization methods that produce scaling factors:\n        - x_sf is reshaped from 1D to 2D: [num_elements] -> [batch_size, ceil_div(hidden_size, scaling_vector_size)]\n        - The 2D shape is required for proper handling in alltoall/allgather operations\n        - scaling_vector_size is typically the group size for block-wise quantization\n        \"\"\"\n        x_sf = None\n        if self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n            if post_quant_comm:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_dequant[0])\n            else:\n                x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_gate_dequant[0])\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            if isinstance(x, Fp4QuantizedTensor):\n                assert not x.is_sf_swizzled, \"Fp4QuantizedTensor should not be swizzled before communication\"\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = x.fp4_tensor, x.scaling_factor\n            else:\n                # Apply pre_quant_scale if it exists (for NVFP4_AWQ)\n                # fc31_act_scale shape: (1, hidden_size)\n                # x shape: (num_tokens, hidden_size)\n                if hasattr(\n                        self,\n                        'fc31_act_scale') and self.fc31_act_scale is not None:\n                    x = x * self.fc31_act_scale\n\n                pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n                if pad_size > 0:\n                    x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n\n                x_row = x.shape[0]\n                x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                    x, self.fc31_input_scale, self.scaling_vector_size, False,\n                    False)\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.mxfp8_quantize(\n                x, False, alignment=self.quant_method.input_hidden_alignment)\n            x_row, x_col = x.shape[0], x.shape[1]\n        elif self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n            # For SM100+, fp8_quantize_1x128 returns x_sf with shape (blocked_n, num_tokens),\n            # but moe_a2a_dispatch requires all payloads to have first dim = num_tokens.\n            # Transpose x_sf before dispatch and transpose back after receive, but this may\n            # introduce perf regression. So we don't supports post_quant_comm for fp8_block_scales.\n            # TODO: Consider remove the constraint of the OneSided AlltoAll\n            pass\n        elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            pad_size = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[-1] * 2 - x.shape[-1]\n            x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x, (0, pad_size))\n        elif self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            x, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                x, 1.0 / self.fc31_input_scale)\n        else:\n            raise ValueError(\n                f\"unsupported quantization mode for post communication: {self.quant_config.quant_mode}\"\n            )\n\n        if x_sf is not None:\n            x_sf = x_sf.view(x_row, -1)\n\n        return x, x_sf\n\n    def supports_moe_output_in_alltoall_workspace(self):\n        return self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8\n\n    def run_moe(\n        self,\n        x: torch.Tensor,\n        token_selected_experts: torch.Tensor,\n        token_final_scales: Optional[torch.Tensor],\n        x_sf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        router_logits: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        moe_output: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    ) -> Union[torch.Tensor, tuple]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Run MoE computation with TRTLLMGen backend.\n\n        This method encapsulates the core MoE computation logic, handling different\n        quantization schemes (fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_nvfp4_fp8,\n        w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8).\n\n        Args:\n            # Standard MoE interface parameters:\n            x: Input hidden states (may be pre-quantized)\n            token_selected_experts: Expert IDs [num_tokens, top_k]. If EPLB is enabled,\n                                    this represents expert slots [num_tokens, top_k] instead.\n            token_final_scales: Final scaling factors for each token\n            x_sf: Input scale factors (optional, for certain quantization schemes)\n\n            # TRTLLMGen-specific additional parameters:\n            router_logits: Router logits for integrated routing in some kernels.\n                          Should be None if routing has already been done (e.g., post_quant_comm).\n            do_finalize: Whether to finalize the output. If False, returns intermediate\n                        results (tuple) for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8 schemes.\n            moe_output: Pre-allocated output buffer from workspace (optional).\n                       Used for mnnvlthroughput alltoall backend to avoid extra copies.\n\n        Returns:\n            If do_finalize=True: final_hidden_states tensor\n            If do_finalize=False: tuple of intermediate outputs (for nvfp4 and w4a8_nvfp4_fp8)\n        \"\"\"\n        # Extract routing parameters from routing_method\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n            routing_bias = self.routing_method.e_score_correction_bias\n            n_group = self.routing_method.routing_impl.n_group\n            topk_group = self.routing_method.routing_impl.topk_group\n            routed_scaling_factor = self.routing_method.routing_impl.routed_scaling_factor\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n            routing_bias = None\n            n_group = None\n            topk_group = None\n            routed_scaling_factor = None\n\n        routing_bias = routing_bias if router_logits is not None else None\n\n        # Ensure x_sf is 2D before flattening\n        if x_sf is not None:\n            assert len(\n                x_sf.shape\n            ) == 2, f\"x_sf should be 2D tensor, got shape {x_sf.shape}\"\n            x_sf = x_sf.flatten()\n\n        if self.has_deepseek_fp8_block_scales:\n            assert do_finalize, \"fp8_block_scale_moe_runner does not support do_finalize=False\"\n            # fp8_block_scale_moe_runner needs 2D shape for x_sf and only support SM100+\n            if x_sf is None:\n                x, x_sf = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_quantize_1x128(x)\n\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scaling_factor,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scaling_factor,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                self.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n        elif self.has_nvfp4:\n            factor = 1 if self.activation_type == ActivationType.Relu2 else 2\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // factor\n            act_type = self._to_trtllm_gen_activation_type(self.activation_type)\n            outputs = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w3_w1_bias if self.bias else None,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w2_bias if self.bias else None,\n                self.fc31_scale_c.data,\n                self.fc31_alpha.data,\n                self.fc2_alpha.data,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                act_type=act_type,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n            )\n\n            if not do_finalize:\n                assert not self.reduce_results, \"reduce_results must be False when do_finalize is False\"\n                return outputs\n            else:\n                final_hidden_states = outputs[0]\n                # Slice output if it was padded\n                if final_hidden_states.shape[1] > self.hidden_size:\n                    final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                              hidden_size].contiguous(\n                                                              )\n        elif self.has_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.bf16_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n            )\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                      hidden_size].contiguous()\n        elif self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n\n            outputs = torch.ops.trtllm.fp8_fp4_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn),\n                self.fc31_scale_c.data,\n                self.fc31_alpha.data,\n                self.fc2_alpha.data,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                self.intermediate_size_per_partition,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                do_finalize=do_finalize,\n                act_type=0,\n                topk_ids=token_selected_experts,\n                topk_weights=token_final_scales,\n            )\n\n            if not do_finalize:\n                assert not self.reduce_results, \"reduce_results must be False when do_finalize is False\"\n                return outputs\n            else:\n                final_hidden_states = outputs[0]\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n\n            final_hidden_states = torch.ops.trtllm.e4m3_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.fc31_input_dequant,\n                self.fc31_input_gate_dequant,\n                self.fc2_input_dequant,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n            )\n            final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states[:, :self.\n                                                      hidden_size].contiguous()\n        elif self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n\n            mxfp8_x, sf = x, x_sf\n\n            intermediate_size_per_partition_padded = self.w3_w1_weight.shape[\n                -2] // 2\n\n            result = torch.ops.trtllm.mxe4m3_mxe2m1_block_scale_moe_runner(\n                router_logits,\n                routing_bias,\n                x,\n                x_sf,\n                self.w3_w1_weight,\n                self.w3_w1_weight_scale,\n                self.w3_w1_bias,\n                self.swiglu_alpha,\n                self.swiglu_beta,\n                self.swiglu_limit,\n                self.w2_weight,\n                self.w2_weight_scale,\n                self.w2_bias,\n                self.num_slots,\n                top_k,\n                n_group,\n                topk_group,\n                intermediate_size_per_partition_padded,\n                self.hidden_size,\n                self.quant_method.intermediate_size_per_partition_lean,\n                self.slot_start,\n                self.expert_size_per_partition,\n                routed_scaling_factor,\n                self.routing_method.routing_method_type,\n                0,  # act_type\n                token_final_scales,\n                token_selected_experts,\n                output=moe_output,\n            )\n\n            # When output is provided, use it directly as the result\n            # (custom op returns empty tensor to avoid PyTorch aliasing constraints)\n            final_hidden_states = moe_output if moe_output is not None else result\n        else:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scaling, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8 and w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 dtypes.\"\n            )\n\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def forward_impl(\n        self,\n        x: Union[torch.Tensor, Fp4QuantizedTensor],\n        router_logits: torch.Tensor,\n        *,\n        do_finalize: bool = True,\n        all_rank_num_tokens: Optional[List[int]] = None,\n        use_dp_padding: Optional[bool] = None,\n        **kwargs,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16\n\n        # Get top_k for routing (other routing parameters are extracted inside run_moe)\n        if isinstance(self.routing_method, DeepSeekV3MoeRoutingMethod):\n            top_k = self.routing_method.routing_impl.top_k\n        else:\n            top_k = self.routing_method.top_k\n\n        run_post_quant_allgather = (self.use_dp and self.parallel_size > 1\n                                    and not self.enable_alltoall)\n        post_quant_comm = run_post_quant_allgather or self.enable_alltoall\n\n        x_sf = None\n        token_selected_experts = None\n        token_final_scales = None\n        token_count = x.shape[0]\n        alltoall_info = None\n        # Determine if this is first/last call (TRTLLMGenFusedMoE doesn't use chunking)\n        is_first_call = self.repeat_idx == 0\n        is_last_call = self.repeat_idx == self.repeat_count - 1\n\n        if post_quant_comm:\n            self._load_balancer_start_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = self.routing_method.apply(\n                router_logits)\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_experts.to(torch.int32)\n            if token_final_scales is not None:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n\n            self._load_balancer_done_wait_gpu_stage(is_first_call)\n\n            ignore_allreduce = self.enable_alltoall and self.alltoall_method_type in (\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided,\n                AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided,\n            )\n            self._load_balancer_update_statistic(\n                token_selected_experts,\n                is_first_call,\n                is_last_call,\n                ignore_allreduce=ignore_allreduce)\n\n            # Route tokens to slots\n            token_selected_slots = self._load_balancer_route(\n                token_selected_experts, self.use_dp)\n\n            # Update expert statistics\n            ExpertStatistic.set_layer(self.layer_idx)\n            ExpertStatistic.maybe_add_info(self.num_slots, token_selected_slots)\n\n            # Use routed slots for subsequent processing\n            token_selected_experts = token_selected_slots\n\n            x, x_sf = self.quantize_input(x)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            assert all_rank_num_tokens is not None, \"all_rank_num_tokens required for alltoall\"\n\n            runtime_max_tokens_per_rank = max(\n                all_rank_num_tokens) if all_rank_num_tokens else token_count\n\n            if token_final_scales is None:\n                token_final_scales = torch.ones_like(token_selected_experts,\n                                                     dtype=torch.float32)\n            else:\n                token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.float32)\n\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                assert self.alltoall_prepare_workspace is not None, \"alltoall_prepare_workspace should be initialized\"\n                if is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                else:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                alltoall_info, gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv_prepare_without_allgather(\n                    token_selected_experts,\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info,\n                    self.alltoall_prepare_workspace,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size,\n                    self.num_experts,\n                    self.num_slots,\n                    top_k,\n                )\n                if gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n                    gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info.view(\n                        (self.mapping.moe_ep_size, self.num_experts))\n                    self._load_balancer_update_statistic_with_gathered_statistic(\n                        gathered_loadbalancer_local_statistic_info)\n\n        if self.enable_alltoall:\n            if self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkTwoSided:\n                x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales = MnnvlMoe.mnnvl_moe_alltoallv(\n                    [x, x_sf, token_selected_experts, token_final_scales],\n                    alltoall_info,\n                    self.alltoall_workspace,\n                    self.ep_rank,\n                    self.ep_size,\n                )\n\n                torch.ops.trtllm.memset_expert_ids(\n                    token_selected_experts,\n                    alltoall_info.recv_rank_count_cumsum,\n                    runtime_max_tokens_per_rank,\n                    top_k,\n                    -1,  # Caution: TRTLLM-Gen uses -1 as invalid token expert id\n                    self.ep_size,\n                )\n\n                if token_final_scales is not None:\n                    token_final_scales = token_final_scales.to(torch.bfloat16)\n            elif self.alltoall_method_type == AlltoallMethodType.NVLinkOneSided:\n                payloads = []\n                payloads.append(x)\n                if x_sf is not None:\n                    payloads.append(x_sf)\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 2\n                else:\n                    expert_id_payload_index = 1\n                payloads.append(token_selected_experts)\n                payloads.append(token_final_scales)\n\n                loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = None\n                if self.layer_load_balancer and is_last_call:\n                    loadbalancer_local_statistic_info = self._load_balancer_get_local_statistic_tensor(\n                    )\n                if loadbalancer_local_statistic_info is not None:\n intermediate_size, hidden_size)\n    set_tensor_value_4(w2_weight, hidden_size, intermediate_size)\n    set_tensor_value_3(w3_weight, intermediate_size, hidden_size)\n    return w1_weight, w2_weight, alignment * alignment\n\n\ndef dist_to_alignment(size, alignment):\n    return round_up(size, alignment) - size\n\n\ndef set_tensor_value_2(x, num_row, num_cols):\n    \"\"\"Set tensor values using a    quant_algo: Quantization algorithm\n        x: Input tensor for deriving scales\n        backend_type: Optional backend type to determine scale format.\n                      DEEPGEMM requires E8M0 scale format for FP8_BLOCK_SCALES.\n    \"\"\"\n    quantize_util_cls = None\n    quant_config = None\n    quant_kwargs = {}\n    if quant_algo is None:\n        quantize_util_cls = BaseQuantizeUtil\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n        quantize_util_cls = FP8QuantizeUtil\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.FP8)\n        _, x_scale = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(x)\n        x_scale = x_scale.float().squeeze()\n        quant_kwargs[\"x_scale\"] = x_scale\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n        quantize_util_cls = NVFP4QuantizeUtil\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.NVFP4)\n        x_sf_global = (448 * 6) / x.abs().max().float()\n        quant_kwargs[\"x_sf_global\"] = x_sf_global\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES)\n        # Different backends have different numerical behaviors for FP8 block scaling:\n        # - DEEPGEMM: Uses E8M0 scale format with manual grouped_gemm reference\n        # - TRTLLM: Uses regular float scale with relaxed accuracy thresholds\n        # - Others (CUTLASS, CUTEDSL): Use FP8BlockScalesQuantizeUtil with cute_dsl_blockscaling_mm\n        backend_name = _normalize_backend_name(backend_type)\n        if backend_name is not None:\n            if backend_name == \"DEEPGEMM\":\n                # Use DEEPGEMM-specific util with E8M0 scales and manual grouped_gemm reference\n                quantize_util_cls = DeepGemmFP8BlockScalesQuantizeUtil\n            elif backend_name == \"TRTLLM\":\n                # Use FP8BlockScalesQuantizeUtil with TRTLLMGenFP8BlockScalesRefModule as ref\n                # TRTLLMGenFP8BlockScalesRefModule has relaxed accuracy thresholds\n                quantize_util_cls = FP8BlockScalesQuantizeUtil\n                quant_kwargs[\"ref_cls\"] = TRTLLMGenFP8BlockScalesRefModule\n            else:\n                quantize_util_cls = FP8BlockScalesQuantizeUtil\n        else:\n            quantize_util_cls = FP8BlockScalesQuantizeUtil\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n        quantize_util_cls = W4A8NVFP4FP8QuantizeUtil\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n        x_sf_global = 448 / x.abs().max().float()\n        quant_kwargs[\"x_sf_global\"] = x_sf_global\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n        quantize_util_cls = MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        # Different backends have different alignment requirements:\n        # - CUTLASS: weight_alignment=128, input_hidden_alignment=128\n        # - TRTLLM: weight_alignment=128, input_hidden_alignment=512\n        backend_name = _normalize_backend_name(backend_type)\n        if backend_name is not None:\n            if backend_name == \"TRTLLM\":\n                quant_kwargs[\"weight_alignment\"] = 128\n                quant_kwargs[\"input_hidden_alignment\"] = 512\n            elif backend_name == \"CUTLASS\":\n                # CUTLASS and others use weight_alignment for both\n                quant_kwargs[\"weight_alignment\"] = 128\n                quant_kwargs[\"input_hidden_alignment\"] = 128\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n        quantize_util_cls = WFP4A16QuantizeUtil\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4)\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n        quantize_util_cls = W8A16QuantizeUtil\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.W8A16)\n    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n        quantize_util_cls = W4A8AWQQuantizeUtil\n        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ)\n    else:\n        raise ValueError(f\"unsupported quant_algo: {quant_algo}\")\n\n    return quantize_util_cls, quant_config, quant_kwargs\n\n\nclass RefGatedMLPFusedMoE(nn.Module):\n    \"\"\"\n    RefGatedMLPFusedMoE serves as a reference implementation with Gated MLPs designed for correctness testing.\n    It utilizes derived classes to provide extensible support for various quantization algorithms.\n\n    Subclasses can override `scale_keys` to specify which scale fields to load:\n        - \"weight_scale\": weight quantization scale\n        - \"input_scale\": input activation scale\n        - \"weight_scale_2\": secondary weight scale (for NVFP4-like quantization)\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Scale keys to load for this quantization method (subclasses override this)\n    scale_keys: List[str] = []\n    # Expected quantization algorithm (subclasses override this)\n    expected_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        num_experts: int,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        model_config: Optional[ModelConfig] = None,\n        bias=False,\n        use_cute_dsl_blockscaling_mm=False,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[float] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[float] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[float] = None,\n    ):\n        super().__init__()\n        self.num_experts = num_experts\n        self.routing_method = routing_method\n        self.hidden_size = hidden_size\n        self.intermediate_size = intermediate_size\n        self.bias = bias\n        self.dtype = dtype\n        if model_config is None:\n            model_config = ModelConfig()\n        self.quant_config = model_config.quant_config\n\n        # Custom swiglu activation for gptoss_style\n        def custom_swiglu(x):\n            gate, value = x.chunk(2, dim=-1)\n            if swiglu_limit is not None and swiglu_limit != float(\"inf\"):\n                gate = gate.clamp(max=swiglu_limit)\n                value = value.clamp(min=-swiglu_limit, max=swiglu_limit)\n\n            alpha = swiglu_alpha if swiglu_alpha is not None else 1.0\n            gate_act = gate * torch.sigmoid(gate * alpha)\n\n            beta = swiglu_beta if swiglu_beta is not None else 0.0\n\n            return gate_act * (value + beta)\n\n        self.experts = nn.ModuleList(\n            [\n                GatedMLP(\n                    hidden_size=self.hidden_size,\n                    intermediate_size=self.intermediate_size,\n                    bias=bias,\n                    dtype=self.dtype,\n                    config=model_config,\n                    use_cute_dsl_blockscaling_mm=use_cute_dsl_blockscaling_mm,\n                    activation=custom_swiglu if swiglu_alpha is not None else F.silu,\n                )\n                for _ in range(self.num_experts)\n            ]\n        )\n\n    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor, router_logits: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n        assert hidden_states.shape[-1] == self.hidden_size\n        hidden_states = hidden_states.view(-1, self.hidden_size)\n        selected_experts, routing_weights = self.routing_method.apply(router_logits)\n        final_hidden_states = torch.zeros(\n            hidden_states.shape, dtype=hidden_states.dtype, device=hidden_states.device\n        )\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            if not torch.any(selected_experts == expert_id):\n                continue\n            batch_idx, nth_expert = torch.where(selected_experts == expert_id)\n            expert_inputs = hidden_states[batch_idx]\n            output = self.experts[expert_id](expert_inputs)\n            final_hidden_states[batch_idx] += (\n                routing_weights[batch_idx, nth_expert, None] * output.float()\n            )\n        final_hidden_states = final_hidden_states.reshape(hidden_states.shape)\n        return final_hidden_states\n\n    def _load_expert_weights_with_scales(self, weights: Dict, expert: int):\n        \"\"\"Load weights for a single expert with configured scale keys.\"\"\"\n        gate_up_proj_weights = [{}, {}]\n        down_proj_weights = [{}]\n\n        # Load base weights\n        gate_up_proj_weights[0][\"weight\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w1.weight\"]\n        gate_up_proj_weights[1][\"weight\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w3.weight\"]\n        down_proj_weights[0][\"weight\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w2.weight\"]\n\n        # Load bias if enabled\n        if self.bias:\n            gate_up_proj_weights[0][\"bias\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w1.bias\"]\n            gate_up_proj_weights[1][\"bias\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w3.bias\"]\n            down_proj_weights[0][\"bias\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w2.bias\"]\n\n        # Load scale keys defined by subclass\n        for scale_key in self.scale_keys:\n            gate_up_proj_weights[0][scale_key] = weights[f\"{expert}.w1.{scale_key}\"]\n            gate_up_proj_weights[1][scale_key] = weights[f\"{expert}.w3.{scale_key}\"]\n            down_proj_weights[0][scale_key] = weights[f\"{expert}.w2.{scale_key}\"]\n\n        self.experts[expert].gate_up_proj.load_weights(gate_up_proj_weights)\n        self.experts[expert].down_proj.load_weights(down_proj_weights)\n\n    def load_weights(self, weights_list: List[Dict]):\n        assert len(weights_list) == 1\n        weights = weights_list[0]\n\n        # Validate quant_algo if expected\n        if self.expected_quant_algo is not None:\n            assert self.quant_config and self.quant_config.quant_algo == self.expected_quant_algo, (\n                f\"expect quant_algo to be {self.expected_quant_algo}\"\n            )\n\n        for expert in range(self.num_experts):\n            self._load_expert_weights_with_scales(weights, expert)\n\n    def check_accuracy(self, output, ref_output):\n        # Relaxed percent from 0.984 to 0.96 to handle small tensor statistical variance.\n        # For small outputs (e.g., h=64), a few outliers can cause high mismatch percentage.\n        # Example: 2/64 mismatch = 3.125% > 1.6% (old threshold), but only 2 elements differ.\n        check_accuracy(output, ref_output, rtol=2e-1, atol=2e-1, percent=0.96)\n\n\nclass BaseQuantizeUtil(ABC):\n    \"\"\"\n    BaseQuantizeUtil serves as a base class for MoE correctess testing which provides interface\n    to create quantized weights and reference modules. It can be extended for different quantization algorithms.\n    Supports gptoss_style with custom swiglu parameters.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        num_experts: int,\n        dtype: torch.dtype,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        quant_config: QuantConfig,\n        bias: bool = False,\n        gptoss_style: bool = False,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[float] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[float] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[float] = None,\n    ):\n        self.num_experts = num_experts\n        self.dtype = dtype\n        self.intermediate_size = intermediate_size\n        self.hidden_size = hidden_size\n        self.quant_config = quant_config\n        self.bias = bias\n        self._gptoss_style = gptoss_style\n        self.swiglu_alpha = swiglu_alpha\n        self.swiglu_beta = swiglu_beta\n        self.swiglu_limit = swiglu_limit\n\n        # Pre-create swiglu tensors if gptoss_style is enabled\n        if self._gptoss_style:\n            self._swiglu_tensors = self._create_swiglu_tensors()\n        else:\n            self._swiglu_tensors = None\n\n    @property\n    def gptoss_style(self) -> bool:\n        \"\"\"Check if gptoss_style is enabled.\"\"\"\n        return self._gptoss_style\n\n    def _create_swiglu_tensors(self) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Internal method to create swiglu tensors for MoE backend.\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with 'swiglu_alpha', 'swiglu_beta', 'swiglu_limit' tensors.\n        \"\"\"\n        return {\n            \"swiglu_alpha\": torch.full(\n                (self.num_experts,), self.swiglu_alpha, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n            ),\n            \"swiglu_beta\": torch.full(\n                (self.num_experts,), self.swiglu_beta, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n            ),\n            \"swiglu_limit\": torch.full(\n                (self.num_experts,), self.swiglu_limit, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n            ),\n        }\n\n    def get_swiglu_tensors(self) -> Optional[Dict[str, torch.Tensor]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get pre-created swiglu tensors.\n\n        Returns:\n            Dict with swiglu tensors if gptoss_style is enabled, None otherwise.\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._swiglu_tensors\n\n    def create_weights(self, **quant_kwargs) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create quantized weights for MoE experts.\n        \"\"\"\n        assert self.quant_config is None, \"quant_config should be None for BaseQuantizeUtil\"\n        weights = {}\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            w1_weight = torch.randn(\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n            )\n            w2_weight = torch.randn(\n                (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n            )\n            w3_weight = torch.randn(\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n            )\n\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] = w1_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] = w2_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] = w3_weight\n        return weights\n\n    def create_ref_module(self, routing_method, ref_cls=RefGatedMLPFusedMoE) -> torch.nn.Module:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a reference module for correctness testing.\n        \"\"\"\n        ref_fused_moe = ref_cls(\n            num_experts=self.num_experts,\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            hidden_size=self.hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=self.intermediate_size,\n            dtype=self.dtype,\n            model_config=ModelConfig(quant_config=self.quant_config),\n            bias=self.bias,\n            swiglu_alpha=self.swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=self.swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=self.swiglu_limit,\n        )\n        return ref_fused_moe\n\n\nclass FP8RefGatedMLPFusedMoE(RefGatedMLPFusedMoE):\n    \"\"\"Reference implementation of FP8 quantization for correctness testing.\"\"\"\n\n    scale_keys = [\"weight_scale\", \"input_scale\"]\n    expected_quant_algo = QuantAlgo.FP8\n\n    def check_accuracy(self, output, ref_output):\n        # Relaxed percent from 0.99 to 0.97 to account for FP8 quantization error accumulation\n        # in large intermediate dimensions and multi-expert routing computations.\n        # Theoretical basis: FP8 (E4M3) has ~12.5% unit error, accumulated error grows as sqrt(K)\n        # where K is GEMM reduction dimension. Max observed mismatch is ~2.1% < 3%.\n        check_accuracy(output, ref_output, rtol=4e-2, atol=1e-1, percent=0.97)\n\n\nclass FP8QuantizeUtil(BaseQuantizeUtil):\n    \"\"\"\n    FP8QuantizeUtil inherits from BaseQuantizeUtil to support correctness testing for FP8 quantized MoE modules.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def create_weights(self, **quant_kwargs) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create quantized weights for MoE experts.\n        \"\"\"\n        assert self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8, (\n            \"expect quant_algo to be fp8\"\n        )\n        bias = quant_kwargs.get(\"bias\", False)\n        weights = {}\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            w1_weight = torch.randn(\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n            )\n            w2_weight = torch.randn(\n                (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n            )\n            w3_weight = torch.randn(\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n            )\n\n            w1_weight_fp8, w1_weight_scale = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                w1_weight\n            )\n            w1_weight_fp8 = w1_weight_fp8.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn).cuda()\n            w2_weight_fp8, w2_weight_scale = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                w2_weight\n            )\n            w2_weight_fp8 = w2_weight_fp8.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn).cuda()\n            w3_weight_fp8, w3_weight_scale = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n                w3_weight\n            )\n            w3_weight_fp8 = w3_weight_fp8.view(torch.float8_e4m3fn).cuda()\n\n            assert \"x_scale\" in quant_kwargs, \"x_scale is required for FP8 quant\"\n            x_scale = quant_kwargs[\"x_scale\"]\n            w1_input_scale = x_scale.cuda()\n            w2_input_scale = x_scale.cuda()\n            w3_input_scale = x_scale.cuda()\n\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] = w1_weight_fp8\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] = w2_weight_fp8\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] = w3_weight_fp8\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale\"] = w1_weight_scale.float()\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale\"] = w2_weight_scale.float()\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale\"] = w3_weight_scale.float()\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.input_scale\"] = w1_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.input_scale\"] = w2_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.input_scale\"] = w3_input_scale\n\n            if bias:\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    (self.intermediate_size,), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n                )\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    (self.hidden_size,), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n                )\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    (self.intermediate_size,), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n                )\n        return weights\n\n    def create_ref_module(self, routing_method, ref_cls=FP8RefGatedMLPFusedMoE) -> torch.nn.Module:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a \"\"\"Reference implementation of NVFP4 quantization for correctness testing.\"\"\"\n\n    scale_keys = [\"weight_scale\", \"input_scale\", \"weight_scale_2\"]\n    expected_quant_algo = QuantAlgo.NVFP4\n\n    def __init__(self, *args, gptoss_style: bool = False, **kwargs):\n        super().__init__(*args, **kwargs)\n        self.gptoss_style = gptoss_style\n\n    def inherits from BaseQuantizeUtil to support correctness testing for NVFP4 quantized MoE modules.\n    Supports gptoss_style with custom swiglu parameters (inherited from BaseQuantizeUtil).\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def create_weights(self, **quant_kwargs) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create quantized weights for MoE experts.\n        \"\"\"\n        assert self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4, (\n            \"expect quant_algo to be NVFP4\"\n        )\n        weights = {}\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            w1_weight = (\n                torch.randn(\n                    (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n                )\n                * 0.05\n            )\n            w2_weight = (\n                torch.randn(\n                    (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n                )\n                * 0.05\n            )\n            w3_weight = (\n                torch.randn(\n                    (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\"\n                )\n                * 0.05\n            )\n\n            assert \"x_sf_global\" in quant_kwargs, \"x_sf_global is required for NVFP4 quant\"\n\n            scaling_vector_size = quant_kwargs.get(\"scaling_vector_size\", 16)\n            x_sf_global = quant_kwargs[\"x_sf_global\"]\n\n            w1_sf_global = (448 * 6) / w1_weight.abs().max().float()\n            w2_sf_global = (448 * 6) / w2_weight.abs().max().float()\n            w3_sf_global = (448 * 6) / w3_weight.abs().max().float()\n\n            w3_w1_global = min(\n                w1_sf_global, w3_sf_global\n            )  # w3 global and w1 global must be the same\n\n            # start to quantize\n            w1_weight_nvfp4, w1_sf_block_unswizzled = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                w1_weight, w3_w1_global, scaling_vector_size, False, False\n            )\n            w1_sf_block_unswizzled = w1_sf_block_unswizzled.view(self.intermediate_size, -1)\n\n            w2_weight_nvfp4, w2_sf_block_unswizzled = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                w2_weight, w2_sf_global, scaling_vector_size, False, False\n            )\n            w2_sf_block_unswizzled = w2_sf_block_unswizzled.view(self.hidden_size, -1)\n\n            w3_weight_nvfp4, w3_sf_block_unswizzled = torch.ops.trtllm.fp4_quantize(\n                w3_weight, w3_w1_global, scaling_vector_size, False, False\n            )\n            w3_sf_block_unswizzled = w3_sf_block_unswizzled.view(self.intermediate_size, -1)\n\n            w1_input_scale = x_sf_global.cuda()\n            w2_input_scale = x_sf_global.cuda()\n            w3_input_scale = x_sf_global.cuda()\n\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] = w1_weight_nvfp4\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] = w2_weight_nvfp4\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] = w3_weight_nvfp4\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale\"] = w1_sf_block_unswizzled.view(\n                torch.float8_e4m3fn\n            ).cuda()\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale\"] = w2_sf_block_unswizzled.view(\n                torch.float8_e4m3fn\n            ).cuda()\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale\"] = w3_sf_block_unswizzled.view(\n                torch.float8_e4m3fn\n            ).cuda()\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.input_scale\"] = 1.0 / w1_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.input_scale\"] = 1.0 / w2_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.input_scale\"] = 1.0 / w3_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale_2\"] = 1.0 / w3_w1_global\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale_2\"] = 1.0 / w2_sf_global\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale_2\"] = 1.0 / w3_w1_global\n\n            # Note: NVFP4 bias uses torch.float dtype\n            if self.bias:\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    self.intermediate_size, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n                )\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    self.hidden_size, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n                )\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    self.intermediate_size, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n                )\n        return weights\n\n    def create_ref_module(\n        self, routing_method, ref_cls=NVFP4RefGatedMLPFusedMoE\n    ) -> torch.nn.Module:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a reference module for correctness testing with gptoss_style support.\n        \"\"\"\n        ref_fused_moe = ref_cls(\n            num_experts=self.num_experts,\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            hidden_size=self.hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=self.intermediate_size,\n            dtype=self.dtype,\n            model_config=ModelConfig(quant_config=self.quant_config),\n            bias=self.bias,\n            gptoss_style=self.gptoss_style,\n            swiglu_alpha=self.swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=self.swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=self.swiglu_limit,\n        )\n        return ref_fused_moe\n\n\nclass FP8BlockScalesRefGatedMLPFusedMoE(RefGatedMLPFusedMoE):\n    \"\"\"Reference implementation of FP8 block-wise quantization for correctness FP8BlockScalesQuantizeUtil inherits from BaseQuantizeUtil to support correctness testing\n    for FP8 block-wise quantized MoE modules.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def create_weights(self, **quant_kwargs) ->      weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] = w1_weight_fp8\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] = w2_weight_fp8\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] = w3_weight_fp8\n
